Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for Chloe's audit request using search_emails (query: "Chloe" or "caseload" or "clean up"). Discover email_inject_chloe_suki_audit_req from chloe.vance@moveops.com (April 25, 2026) detailing five numbered action items: audit Airtable statuses, reconcile Linear tickets, reply to unanswered vendor emails (Road Runner on Marcus Webb, Carmen on Simone Richter), email Carmen for Jordan Ekwueme's new apartment listings, and post a status summary in #operations.
OE 2: Search emails for unanswered vendor communications using search_emails (query: "Road Runner" or "vehicle" or "Marcus Webb"). Discover email_inject_roadrunner_webb_delay from dispatch@roadrunnerautotransport.com (April 16, 2026) reporting a carrier breakdown outside Indianapolis for Marcus Webb's 2019 Honda Civic, with a revised delivery estimate of April 23-25 (originally April 18). The email has been sitting unanswered for 10 days.
OE 3: Search emails for Carmen/UrbanNest communications using search_emails (query: "Carmen" or "Simone" or "UrbanNest" or "housing"). Discover email_inject_carmen_simone_housing from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com (April 18, 2026) flagging that Simone Richter's temp unit at The Harborview expires April 20 and requesting extension approval or permanent housing confirmation. The email has been unanswered for 8 days with the deadline already passed.
OE 4: Search emails for Jordan Ekwueme's apartment rejection using search_emails (query: "Jordan" or "apartment" or "Ekwueme"). Discover email_inject_jordan_apt_reject from jordan.ekwueme@brightloopanalytics.com (April 24, 2026) rejecting all three apartments (Central Square - mold, Davis Square - flooding/structural crack, Brookline - wrong transit line and over budget) and requesting new listings: Back Bay or South End, under $2,800/month, near Red Line, working elevator, under 20 minutes to BrightLoop HQ at 100 Summer St. His temp housing at The Hive expires April 26 (today).
OE 5: List or search Airtable relocation records using airtable_list_records or airtable_search_records on the Relocations table to audit all records assigned to Suki Patel. Discover that recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin (Jae-won Kim, StormCloud) shows Status: Completed incorrectly - lease is unsigned and guarantor paperwork is pending. Also discover that recReloc00000008 (Jordan Ekwueme, BrightLoop) shows Status: Completed incorrectly - he rejected all apartment options and the move is not finalized. Other Suki records include recSimoneRichterBrightloop (Simone Richter, BrightLoop, In Progress), recMarcusWebbBrightloop (Marcus Webb, BrightLoop, Atlanta→Boston, In Progress - this is the active relocation tied to the Road Runner vehicle delay), rec_reloc_webb (Marcus Webb, older Atlanta→Denver relocation, Completed), recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver (Deshawn Hartley, Mosaic, In Progress), plus additional Vectral (Daniel Reeves, Maya Johansson, Terrence Nakamura, Camille Oduya), Mosaic (Andre Washington, Andre Mitchell), Sunbelt, Palmetto, and Mosswood relocations.
OE 6: Search Linear tickets for Suki's relocations using linear_list_issues (query: "Jae-won" or "StormCloud" or "Jordan" or "BrightLoop"). Discover key tickets including linear_issue_c97359216490 ("StormCloud Relocation - Jae-won Kim - SEA → AUS", description says closing as part of batch closeout but lease is actually unsigned), issue_brightloop_ekwueme_apt ("Apartment Search - Jordan Ekwueme - Boston Area"), and other related BrightLoop/StormCloud tickets that need status reconciliation.
OE 7: Search Slack #operations channel for Chloe's message using conversations_history (channel_id: "C006") or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "DOT" or "training" or "hazmat"). Discover Chloe's message (ts: 1777120200.000000, April 25, 2026) announcing that DOT hazmat training was rescheduled from April 24 to Monday April 28 at 2:00 PM Pacific on Zoom, with mandatory attendance for Suki and others, and a requirement to complete the pre-training documentation checklist before Monday.
OE 8: Search CRM for BrightLoop deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "BrightLoop") or crm_search_companies (name: "BrightLoop") followed by crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_brightloop"). Discover two BrightLoop deals: deal_brightloop_q2 ("BrightLoop Analytics - Q2 2026 Relocation (1 employee)" covering Jordan Ekwueme, stage: qualifiedtobuy) and deal_brightloop_apr2026 ("BrightLoop Analytics - April 2026 Relocations (Simone Richter + Marcus Webb)", stage: closedwon).
OE 9: Update Jae-won Kim's Airtable record using airtable_update_records (base_id: MoveOps base, table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin", fields: {Status: "In Progress"}}]). Corrects the false completion - lease is unsigned and guarantor paperwork is pending.
OE 10: Update Jordan Ekwueme's Airtable record using airtable_update_records (base_id: MoveOps base, table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "recReloc00000008", fields: {Status: "In Progress"}}]). Corrects the incorrect completion - all apartment options were rejected and the move is not finalized.
OE 11: Reply to Road Runner about Marcus Webb's vehicle delay using reply_to_email (email_id: "email_inject_roadrunner_webb_delay", sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com") or send_email (sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com", recipients: ["dispatch@roadrunnerautotransport.com"]). Content acknowledges the delay, requests current delivery status and revised ETA, and confirms that Marcus Webb and BrightLoop will be notified.
OE 12: Reply to Carmen Reyes about Simone Richter's housing situation using reply_to_email (email_id: "email_inject_carmen_simone_housing", sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com") or send_email (sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com", recipients: ["carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com"]). Content apologizes for the delayed response, asks whether the temp unit at The Harborview was extended past April 20 or whether Simone found her own arrangement, and requests current housing status.
OE 13: Email Carmen Reyes requesting new apartment listings for Jordan Ekwueme using send_email (sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com", recipients: ["carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com"]). Content relays Jordan's updated preferences: Back Bay or South End, under $2,800/month, near Red Line, working elevator, under 20 minutes to BrightLoop HQ at 100 Summer St. Notes urgency - temp housing at The Hive expires today (April 26).
OE 14: Update Jae-won Kim's Linear ticket using linear_create_comment (issueId: "linear_issue_c97359216490", body documenting that Airtable status was corrected from Completed to In Progress, lease is unsigned, and guarantor documentation is still pending) or linear_update_issue (id: "linear_issue_c97359216490", state update to reopen).
OE 15: Update Jordan Ekwueme's apartment search Linear ticket using linear_create_comment (issueId: "issue_brightloop_ekwueme_apt", body noting all three apartments were rejected by Jordan with specific reasons, new search initiated with UrbanNest per updated preferences) or linear_update_issue with updated description.
OE 16: Create a calendar event for the DOT hazmat training using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: "DOT Hazmat Training" or similar, start_datetime: "2026-04-28T14:00:00" Pacific / "2026-04-28T21:00:00Z", description: mandatory training with pre-work checklist required, location: Zoom). This addresses Chloe's Slack message about the scheduling change and ensures Suki is set up for it.
OE 17: Log a CRM engagement on the BrightLoop account using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: summary of current state of BrightLoop's active relocations - Jordan Ekwueme apartment rejection and urgent new search, Marcus Webb vehicle delay, Simone Richter housing gap, company_ids: ["company_brightloop"]). Provides the account team (Mina Hashimoto) with visibility on what is happening.
OE 18: Post a full status summary in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: comprehensive summary covering every Suki-owned relocation with current status, issues found, actions taken, and next steps for each). This gives Chloe and the team full visibility.
OE 19: Reply to Jordan Ekwueme acknowledging his apartment rejection using reply_to_email (email_id: "email_inject_jordan_apt_reject", sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com") or send_email to jordan.ekwueme@brightloopanalytics.com. Content confirms feedback was received, new apartment options matching his preferences are being sourced urgently by UrbanNest, and provides a timeline.
OE 20: Email Marcus Webb about the vehicle delivery delay using send_email (sender: "suki.patel@moveops.com", recipients: ["marcus.webb@brightloopanalytics.com"]). Content notifies him of the carrier breakdown outside Indianapolis and revised delivery timeline for his 2019 Honda Civic (April 23-25 vs original April 18).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 The model must use an Airtable tool (e.g., airtable_list_records, airtable_search_records, or airtable_show_data) to look up relocation records assigned to Suki Patel.
tool selection
